hooks.command: bash -c 'f="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; grep -n "log\." "$f" 2>/dev/null | grep -qE "for\s*\(|while\s*\(" && echo "[WARN] 循环内存在 log. 调用" || true'
bash -c 'f="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; grep -in "password\|token\|secret" "$f" 2>/dev/null | grep -qi "log\." && echo "[WARN] 敏感字段可能被打印到日志" || true'

bash -c 'f="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; grep -q "@Transactional" "$f" 2>/dev/null && grep -q "RestTemplate\|FeignClient" "$f" 2>/dev/null && echo "[WARN] 事务方法内调用了远程接口" || true'

bash -c 'f="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; grep -q "ErrorCode" "$f" 2>/dev/null && ! find . -path "*/resources/i18n/*.properties" -newer "$f" 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && echo "[WARN] 新增错误码后请同步 i18n 资源文件" || true'
